title: Korean Kale Noodles
description: A nutty and silky Korean dish featuring kale and crispy double-fried chicken, this crowd-pleaser is a must-try for any noodle lover.
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the rice noodles according to the package instructions.
In a large skillet, heat the sesame oil over medium-high heat and cook the chicken breast until browned and cooked through.
In a separate skillet, heat a couple of inches of oil over medium-high heat and double-fry the cooked chicken until crispy.
In a large bowl, whisk together the soy sauce, Korean chili flakes, and minced garlic.
Add the cooked noodles to the bowl and toss to coat with the sauce.
Add the crispy chicken and chopped kale to the bowl and toss to combine.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
